Document Embedding PCA

Each colored point is a document centroid built from page-level embeddings in emb__text_embedding_3_large. Hover points to inspect filenames. The gray background cloud is a random sample of individual pages projected into the same PCA space.

Documents7,129
Pages171,860
Sampled Pages8,000
Median Pages / Doc5.0
Max Pages / Doc6,461
PC1 Variance10.20%
PC2 Variance5.99%
What To Look Forclusters, outliers, density
Interpretation
  • Documents close together have similar centroid embeddings in this 2D projection.
  • Larger, warmer points correspond to longer documents.
  • The gray cloud shows where individual pages sit relative to the document centroids.
Method
  • Each page embedding is L2-normalized before document aggregation.
  • A document centroid is the mean of its normalized page embeddings.
  • PCA is fit on document centroids, then sampled pages are projected with the same basis.
